assertions.title: Supported source-native download saves a PDF

steps.action: Run source-native download for an arXiv paper JSON with a direct PDF URL and explicit save dir.
steps.expected: CLI exits 0, returns machine-readable success JSON, and saves a .pdf inside the requested directory.
steps.observed: Exit 0 with state=downloaded and path ending in native-001.pdf under the requested save dir.

steps.action: Inspect the requested save directory after the command.
steps.expected: Exactly one PDF exists in the requested directory.
steps.observed: native-001.pdf exists under the requested save dir with no unexpected files.

assertions.title: Supported source-native read returns extracted text

steps.action: Run source-native read for a PMC paper JSON with a nested save dir that does not exist yet.
steps.expected: CLI exits 0, creates the requested save dir, saves the PDF, and returns JSON with a normalized state plus extracted content or an explicit parse-limited outcome.
steps.observed: Exit 0 with state=extracted, content="Extracted retrieval validation text", and a saved PDF under the newly created nested directory.

steps.action: Inspect the nested save dir after the command.
steps.expected: The requested directory exists and contains the retrieved file.
steps.observed: The missing/nested directory was created and contains read-002.pdf.

assertions.title: Record-dependent retrieval is explicit about no-public-file cases

steps.action: Run record-dependent semantic download with a direct PDF URL.
steps.expected: Success is returned only when a real file is written.
steps.observed: Exit 0 with state=downloaded and semantic-success.pdf created in the requested directory.

steps.action: Run record-dependent semantic download with a missing PDF URL.
steps.expected: CLI returns a normalized non-success explanatory result and leaves no stray file.
steps.observed: Exit 0 with state=not_found, message explaining no public PDF is exposed, and an empty requested directory.

no_public_file_case.message: source "semantic" does not expose a public PDF for this record

steps.action: Run SSRN download for a paper record without a direct PDF URL.
steps.expected: CLI returns an explicit non-success explanatory result instead of claiming download success.
steps.observed: Exit 0 with state=not_found, explanatory message about no public PDF, and no created file.

steps.action: Run SSRN read for the same no-direct-PDF record.
steps.expected: CLI returns an explicit non-success explanatory result instead of claiming extraction success.
steps.observed: Exit 0 with state=not_found, the same explanatory message, and no created file.

evidence.network: No PDF fetch attempted because the SSRN record lacked a direct public PDF URL.

download_case.message: source "ssrn" does not expose a public PDF for this record

read_case.message: source "ssrn" does not expose a public PDF for this record

summary: Tested 4 retrieval assertions through the built CLI artifact: VAL-RETRIEVAL-001, VAL-RETRIEVAL-002, VAL-RETRIEVAL-006, and VAL-RETRIEVAL-013 all passed. Native download/read saved files only when appropriate, created missing save directories, and record-dependent/best-effort paths returned explicit not_found results without stray files when no public PDF was available.
